items.title: Tipsy Elves Men’s St Patrick’s Day Shirt – Funny Irish Graphic T-Shirt, Green Clover St Patricks Tee
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: tipsy, elves, patrick, day, irish, green, clover, patricks. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: leprechaun, martini, cocktail, patrick's, day. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: mens, patricks, day, shirts, irish, clover, shenanigans, hooligan, tees, parade. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
